SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause called for small claims appeal, Judge Pro Tem Paul Gutierrez, nothing on record:
9:45AM
Appellant Eizabeth Chan present in Pro Per; Respondent Ziad Sad appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
Jose Jeter, witness for Ms. Chan, testifies in the narrative.
EXH(A)1 inclusive evidence including photos and car repair estimates.
Ali Ligihat, witness for Mr. Sad, previously sworn testifies in the narrative.
10:15AM
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
